entries.quote: We are seeing a great response from customers, especially Prime members who triple their shopping frequency once they start using Amazon Now. We have further accelerated our expansion and will offer ultra-fast deliveries to customers in over 300 cities of India.
entries.signal: Amazon India is betting that Prime-driven habit formation in quick commerce is its primary growth lever for 2026.
entries.belief: [Inferred · High] Management believes locking Prime members into daily Amazon Now usage will compound across Amazon Pay and broader e-commerce, making the ecosystem increasingly difficult to exit.
